Code fragment: .where(CUSTOMEMOJI.NAME.contains(name))
Explanation: The contains() method performs a LIKE '%name%' search which cannot use standard indexes and will be slow on large tables. Consider using a full-text search index (e.g., PostgreSQL's tsvector/tsquery or MySQL's FULLTEXT) for efficient text searching.
